data.title: UnitedHealthcare Offers Voluntary Buyouts, Possible Layoffs If Targets Not Met: CNBC
data.description: UnitedHealthcare is offering voluntary buyouts to employees, with layoffs possible if targets aren't met. Severance depends on tenure, with final exits by November.

data.title: Elliott Investment Management Buys Wolfspeed Stock, Bets Against Nvidia In Q4
data.description: Elliott Investment Management made several portfolio moves in the fourth quarter, closing multiple options positions and shaking up the activist firm's technology exposure.

data.title: Are You Upper-Middle Class? 6 Signs You've Made It, Even If It Doesn't Feel Like It
Big Money Is Betting On Europe, Should You? 3 ETFs To Watch
data.description: European fund managers are bullish on stocks, with 3 top ETFs to consider: SPDR EURO STOXX 50 (FEZ), Vanguard FTSE Europe (VGK), Xtrackers MSCI EAFE Hedged Equity (DBEF)

data.title: Travelers Companies' Scale And Analytical Advantages Make It Attractive, Analyst Says
data.description: Meyer Shields of Keefe, Bruyette & Woods upgrades Travelers Companies to Outperform, raising the price forecast to $286. The analyst's reserve analysis shows an overestimation of TRV's GAAP loss and ALAE reserves, primarily in workers' compensation and personal lines.
